title: 50% off
description:
* The discount offers are for ABL cardholders for the promotion of ABL respective Cards.
* 50% Discount is capped to PKR 10,000 per transaction.
* Introduction of Fair Usage Terms & Conditions (T&C) for Premium & Infinite Debit Card Discounts; 
  * a. To ensure fair and equitable utilization of discount offers, Allied Bank has introduced Fair Usage Terms & Conditions for Premium and Infinite Debit Card discounts. These terms and conditions have been duly aligned to promote responsible and transparent usage of discount privileges.
  * b. To prevent misuse of card/discounts and its commercial use by the cardholder, the Bank reserves the right to monitor card transactions for excessive or disproportionate usage of discount or promotional offers and can impose any threshold per month consequent to this monitoring. The Bank may, at its sole discretion and without prior notice, restrict, suspend, or cancel the Card and/or withdraw the applicable benefits/discounts. The Bank’s determination of excessive/commercial usage or misuse shall be final and binding, and the Cardholder shall have no right to claim or any recourse in this regard.
  * c. To ensure fair usage of the discount, only one transaction per card per day is allowed at a single alliance partner. Additionally, a maximum of 3 transactions per card per alliances partner are eligible for the discount in a month. If more than 3 transactions are made, the bank reserves the right to charge or recover the full amount of discount from the card holder for any additional transactions.
* The discount is not applicable on logy launch and bakery items.
* Allied Bank Cardholders may be entitled to the discount offers in respect of payments made at the selected Merchants and Alliance Partners through their Allied (Visa, UPI-PayPak) Cards including Credit & Debit cards. The discount offers are not applicable in respect of cash transactions.
* Allied Bank is entitled at any time without any liability to the cardholder in any manner whatsoever to terminate or withdraw or change the criteria and conditions for any or all the discounts and/or promotional offers.
* The discounts are not valid in conjunction with other special promotions and/or discount programs defined by Allied Bank, Merchants and Alliance Partners.
* Allied Bank specific card discounts and/or promotional offers are discretionary and the cardholders are not entitled to claim the same as a matter of their right.
* The Merchants / Alliance Partners reserve the right to refuse or cancel discount for any unforeseen reason or circumstances including but not limited to misuse of discount / multiple transaction on a single card at any given time.
* For any further information, please call Helpline at: 042-111-225-225.
sourceEntityDescription: Ap Kay Dil Mai Hamara Account

title: 40% off Everyday

However, the Alliance Partners have full authority to refuse any promotional offers, and the Bank shall not be liable to the Cardholder for any such refusal.

* The discounts cannot be combined with group discounts, parties, special events or any other offers (where applicable)
* MCB Islamic debit card members are entitled to discounts in respect to payments made at the alliance partners through their MCB Islamic debit card (selective) only and discount is not applicable on cash transaction.
* MCB Islamic Bank shall not be responsible for any customer or third party for unsatisfactory or delayed performance of the alliance partners, losses, damages, delays or cancellations.
* The Alliance partner reserves the right to refuse or cancel any order for any unforeseen reason at any given time.
* MCB Islamic Bank will not be responsible for any complaint or liability whatsoever that arises with respect to items and services availed at the mentioned alliance partner(s).
* MCB Islamic Bank and the Alliance Partner reserve the right to terminate, withdraw or change the criteria of any discount offering without providing prior notice or reason.
* MCB Islamic Bank is not liable for the accuracy of the brand offers mentioned under alliances and for updated brand offers, please refer to the relevant alliance partner’s website.
* The Bank may together with the Alliance Partners, offer discounts from time to time, as part of promotion schemes for the MCB Islamic Debit Cardholders. However, the Alliance Partners have full authority to refuse any promotional offers, and the Bank shall not be liable to the Cardholder for any such refusal.
* Bank Offers including Discounts, Promotional Offers, and Incentives that are discretionary, and the Cardholders are not entitled to claim the same as a matter of their right.
* MCB Islamic Debit cards Terms & Conditions apply (Where applicable).

title: 20% off
description:
* The discount offers are for ABL cardholders for the promotion of ABL respective Cards.
* 20% Discount is capped to PKR 2,000 per transaction.
* Allied Bank Cardholders may be entitled to the discount offers in respect of payments made at the selected Merchants and Alliance Partners through their Allied (Visa, UPI-PayPak) Cards including Credit & Debit cards. The discount offers are not applicable in respect of cash transactions.
* Allied Bank is entitled at any time without any liability to the cardholder in any manner whatsoever to terminate or withdraw or change the criteria and conditions for any or all the discounts and/or promotional offers.
* The discounts are not valid in conjunction with other special promotions and/or discount programs defined by Allied Bank, Merchants and Alliance Partners.
* To ensure fair usage of the discount, only one transaction per card per day is allowed at a single alliance partner. Additionally, a maximum of 3 transactions per card per alliances partner are eligible for the discount in a month. If more than 3 transactions are made, the bank reserves the right to charge or recover the full amount of discount from the card holder for any additional transactions.
* Allied Bank specific card discounts and/or promotional offers are discretionary and the cardholders are not entitled to claim the same as a matter of their right.
* The Merchants / Alliance Partners reserve the right to refuse or cancel discount for any unforeseen reason or circumstances including but not limited to misuse of discount / multiple transaction on a single card at any given time.
* For any further information, please call Helpline at: 042-111-225-225.
